# ServiceNow Release Notes

## Note
The ServiceNow documentation portal (servicenow.com/docs/) requires JavaScript rendering and does not return substantive content via static fetch. The release notes page at /docs/r/release-notes/family-release-notes.html loads dynamically and could not be scraped.

## Last Fetch Attempt
2026-04-05 - Page returned loading screen only (same behavior as previous fetches).
